notes:
It installed fine, tried to launch it and after shaders precompiled it said loading, then running, but nothing ever appeared on screen. I forced Experimental, same thing. Forced 8, same thing. Verified files, went back to experimental per other reports here, same thing. Added proton logging, and there's output. Used some of what I find to search for solutions or tweaks, but didn't find anything actionable. 

My setup for some reason isn't currently compatible. Perhaps it's multi monitors, or something I have installed or tweaked. I'm hoping a future update of proton or the game itself will resolve it.

Zooming out of the map = Performance drain down to like 10 FPS on max zoom.
